name: iridium-codex
description: Connect Codex to your private Iridium advisor memory.

interface.shortDescription: Use your private advisor memory in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to your Iridium advisor through secure OAuth and MCP. The plugin contains no private memory or setup credentials.
defaultPrompt: Use my Iridium advisor to help me plan the next step.
Ask my advisor what context I should consider before making this decision.
